name: Meike 50mm f/1.8 AF Lens
description: An everyday prime lens ideal for a multitude of subject matter, the 50mm f/1.8 AF Lens from Meike is a versatile option for capturing images at a classic focal length.

features.Key Features:: Full-Frame | f/1.8 to f/16 | Fast Aperture Everyday Prime | Autofocus Design | Multilayered Coatings | USB Port for Firmware Upgrades
features.What's in The Box?: Meike 50mm f/1.8 AF Lens (Sony E) | Front Lens Cap | Rear Lens Cap | Lens Hood
